claimBoundary: This manifest governs bicycle-delivery and pedestrian-loop simulations assembled from independently hashed region packs for New York City. Park circuits follow frozen property boundaries, not surveyed sidewalk centerlines. It does not claim live conditions, physical-world autonomy, or control of a real vehicle.
defaultMissionText: Deliver the parcel by bike from Union Square to North Williamsburg. Prefer protected lanes and yield to pedestrians.
missionExamples: Deliver the parcel by bike from Union Square to North Williamsburg. Prefer protected lanes and yield to pedestrians.
Deliver the parcel by bike from West Village to Greenpoint. Prefer protected lanes and yield to pedestrians.
Deliver a parcel by bicycle from Washington Square to McCarren Park. Prefer protected routes.
Deliver the parcel by bike from East Village to North Williamsburg. Avoid Kent Avenue and yield to pedestrians.
Run 5 laps around Union Square Park perimeter.
Walk 1 lap around Union Square Park perimeter.
Run around Union Square Park perimeter for 45 seconds.
Run in circles around Union Squatre Park parimeter until you've run 5000 feet.
